FINDING: api/handler.py:42:SHOULD-FIX
WHAT: missing null check on user.organization before accessing user.organization.team — request from impersonator-without-org could throw
EVIDENCE: api/handler.py:42
IMPACT: 500 error on impersonator path
OPTIONS:
1. add null guard
DIFF_LINE: +  return user.organization.team.id
REACHABLE_PATH: ImpersonateMiddleware can populate user without org; team lookup is the next call
REJECTED_ALTERNATIVE: skipping the lookup when org is null returns wrong default for downstream auth checks
UNVERIFIABLE: no
